environmentNote: Local developer machine sample only; not a product SLA. Single Aspire AppHost on Windows, not a hosted environment.
timerSourceCaveat: All elapsedMs and latency values are measured by the Python smoke harness using time.perf_counter wrapped around the JSON-RPC tools/call write-and-read cycle on the MCP server's stdio pipes. The values therefore include MCP stdio pipe latency plus server-side handler time plus Admin API HTTP latency, not server processing time alone.
lifecycleNote: Per MCP 2025-06-18 spec, a notifications/initialized notification is expected after initialize. The current stdout transcript captures only client->server requests that elicit a response; the post-initialize notification is not present in mcp-stdout-transcript.jsonl. Recorded as evidence gap (DW2 review, P13).

serverInfo.name: hexalith-eventstore-admin
serverInfo.description: Hexalith EventStore administration MCP server — query streams, inspect projections, diagnose issues, and manage operations via AI-callable tools

sampleNote: sampleTools shows the first 20 of 28 tools by enumeration order; the full 28-name list is canonical in mcp-stdout-transcript.jsonl id=2 result.tools[].name. Truncation policy: 20-tool sample for summary readability.

approvalGate: confirm=false; preview returned without invoking destructive action

nonMutationProof: before.totalCount (0) == after.totalCount (0); confirms no consistency-check entry was added by the confirm=false write-preview. Note: a non-zero baseline would make the equality non-trivial; current proof is minimum-bar (DW2 review, P3).

fallbackProofShape: shape-of-success only; the call omitted tenantId/domain after session-set-context for tenant-a/counter and returned 200 with shape. A comparison call with explicit tenantId=tenant-a/domain=counter is NOT recorded; without it the equality of session-applied filtering vs explicit-args filtering cannot be proven from this artifact alone (DW2 review, P7).
